summary: Full regression + iteration-2 verification of SwipeNoten (multi-session collection, aggregated class CSV, delete-all-sessions, Home tile export/share buttons, Summary page export/share/new-round). 16/16 pytest backend tests pass (added test_zz_session_count_aggregate_and_delete and test_zz_delete_sessions_when_none, kept existing 14). Frontend Playwright e2e fully green: session-count badge shows 'Noch keine Bewertung' when 0; export-delete & share-delete buttons hidden at 0 and shown when >0; tap-grading still advances; Summary 'X Bewertung(en) für diese Klasse gesammelt' header rendered; summary-new-round-button creates a new session and routes to /grade/<newId>; after 2 rounds Home shows '2 Bewertungen gesammelt'; export-delete-<id> triggers a CSV browser download (Medu2_alle_Bewertungen_<date>.csv) and session_count returns to 0; Summary export-csv-button also downloads and navigates back to '/'. window.confirm() dialogs are auto-accepted via page.on('dialog'). Aggregated CSV header verified to be 'Vorname,Nachname,<d1>,<d1> #2' for two same-day sessions, rows only for graded students, correct grade in each session column.
critical_code_review_comments: exportClass.js classFileName uses new Date().toLocaleDateString('de-DE') which can render as '25.6.2026' in headless Chrome (single-digit month) -> filename becomes 'Medu2_alle_Bewertungen_25-6-2026.csv'. Backend export.csv route uses strftime('%d-%m-%Y') -> '25-06-2026'. Not a bug (front-end builds its own filename from the blob) but worth aligning to a stable DD-MM-YYYY for consistency.

server.py: bson.ObjectId(class_id) is still used without try/except - a malformed id raises 500 instead of 400/404. Consider validating ObjectId on /classes/{id}, /sessions/{id}, /classes/{id}/sessions, /classes/{id}/export.csv. Same comment carried over from iteration 1.

Summary.jsx catches Export/Share errors but never resets sessionCount state if exportAndDelete succeeded but navigate() races - low risk since we navigate immediately, but the local sessionCount stays stale on the unloaded view.
Aggregated export endpoint loads ALL grades into memory; fine for class sizes <= 100 but worth noting if class sizes grow.
test_credentials: No auth. Sample import file already imported as class 'Medu2' (21 students). Sample at /app/tests/sample.idoceo, password 'test'.
seed_data_creation: Tests delete and re-create sessions for class Medu2; final state of the class after a full pytest run is: 1 session created by the session_id fixture + 3 students graded. After Playwright run all sessions are removed (export-delete + Summary export-csv-button both clean up). Students remain (21).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 16 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set; pytest --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Frontend selectors: session-count-<cid>, start-round-<cid> (label 'Neue Bewertung'), export-delete-<cid>, share-delete-<cid> (hidden when session_count=0). Summary: summary-new-round-button, export-csv-button, export-share-button. Both Home tile and Summary actions trigger window.confirm() - install page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) BEFORE first interaction. Downloads in headless Chrome work via expect_download(); share-delete falls back to download in headless ('Herunterladen & löschen' label). Aggregated CSV header format: 'Vorname,Nachname,<DD.MM.YYYY>[,<DD.MM.YYYY> #2,...]'.
